objective: maximize EdgeBench-lite ad placement satisfaction on public deterministic cases

process_verifiers.name: ad_placement_public_score
command: from evaluator import evaluate; import json; print(json.dumps(evaluate('initial_program.py'), sort_keys=True))

constraints.task_summary: Place non-overlapping integer rectangles on a 10000x10000 grid. Each rectangle must contain its ad point, and satisfaction is highest when rectangle area matches the target area.
constraints.edgebench_alignment: This is an EdgeBench-inspired public-feedback example. The process verifier is work-visible search feedback. No hidden judge is wired into GP; real EdgeBench judge ownership belongs to the external SForge harness.
